workflow.name: Development Story
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}
ECC-ORCHESTRATED STORY DEVELOPMENT — Sequence: planner -> tdd-guide -> build-error-resolver -> code-reviewer
Create handoff documents between sequential agent phases. Synthesize outputs after each agent completes.
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at decision points inside step files.

step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-knowledge.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-story-discovery.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-branch-guard.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-planning.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04a-tdd-setup.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04b-tdd-loop.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-validation.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-test-health.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-review.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-completion.md
